icons.x-mark: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" aria-hidden="true" data-slot="icon"> <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18 18 6M6 6l12 12"/> </svg>

patterns.footer-buttons: When buttonAlignment='left' (default), place primary action button first in footer slot, followed by secondary actions (e.g., Cancel). When buttonAlignment='right', place secondary actions first, then primary action button last. This ensures the visual alignment matches the semantic importance.
patterns.sticky-layout: The dialog uses flexbox column layout with header and footer as flex-shrink: 0 (sticky), and body as flex: 1 with overflow-y: auto. Only the body scrolls when content exceeds available height.

footer._template: Default footer content is two Harmony Button components: primary "Confirm" and ghost "Cancel"; both close the dialog via closeDialog(id). Do not use a raw button; use the Harmony Button component.
footer.defaultDescription: Use Harmony Button components (not a raw button) for default footer actions.

events.name: close
events.description: Triggered by close button, overlay click, or Escape key

state.name: open
state.description: Controlled via .is-open class on the overlay element
